description: Perform a quarterly mailbox maintenance procedure. Document the initial email counts for Inbox, Junk, Sent, Drafts, and Trash. Create a new folder named 'Quarterly-Archive-Q4' and move at least 15 emails from the Inbox into it. Review the Inbox for spam and move any found to the Junk folder. Draft an email to 'it-admin@company.com' with the subject 'Quarterly Mailbox Maintenance Report' containing the 'Before' and 'After' folder counts to document the cleanup.
